revision.comment: Text replacement - "[[Category:automatic wikipedia redirects]]" to "<nowiki>[[Category:Automatic wikipedia redirects]]</nowiki>"
Bot: convert local link → enwiki interwiki
Bot: convert local/ILL link → enwiki interwiki
Bot: convert local link → enwiki interwiki
Bot: add [[Category:templates missing wikidata]] (no interwikis found)
Bot: add [[Category:templates missing wikidata]] (no interwikis found)
Bot: add [[Category:templates missing wikidata]] (no interwikis found)
Bot: add {{wikidata link|Q...}} or [[Category:Templates without wikidata]]

imported only latest revision from https://archive.org/details/miraheze-wiki-shintowiki-20251218 to avoid excessive disk usage, comment on the revision was Text replacement - "↵<noinclude>[[Category:Templates without wikidata]]</noinclude>" to ""
Bot: Adding dummy category to make categories work after wiki restoration
Bot: wrap 3 stray tag(s) in noinclude [[github:EmmaLeonhart/shintowiki-scripts/actions/runs/23127601988|commit triggered pipeline]]

[[Project:History cleanup|Offloading history due to miraheze stability concerns]] many contributors, see [https://emmaleonhart.github.io/shintowiki-scripts/wikihistory.html?page=Braces%2Fdoc here] for full history [[github:EmmaLeonhart/shintowiki-scripts/actions/runs/24756154998|commit triggered pipeline]]
revision.text: {{Documentation subpage}} * This template returns the first unnamed parameter in double braces. To be used to demonstrate template code without the need for clunky nowiki'ing. Further unnamed parameters (up to 8 more) can be used without worrying for pipes. * Set {{mono|code{{=}}on}}{{\}}{{mono|code{{=}}true}}{{\}}etc. to switch the font used to the HTML -style monospaced font. * To improve legibility, {{tl|thin space}}s are inserted either side of any [[:en:Vertical bar|pipe character]]s ("{{thin space|{{!}}}}") displayed by the template. * To ensure equals-signs are handled as text by the template, use {{tl|{{=}}}} to produce them – e.g. {{braces|Templatename|p1{{=}}v1|p2{{=}}v2|...}} (and see examples below). == Function == * This template wraps the [[:en:HTML entities|HTML entities]] {{ and }}. === Limitations === * The template cannot output just the starting double braces or just the ending double braces. You will have to write {{ or }}. Or you could use [[:en:Template:(|Template:(]] and [[Template:)]]. ===Examples=== {{Markup | col2 = Output | {{braces|Templatename|item1|item2}} | {{braces|Templatename|item1|item2}} | {{braces|code=on |Templatename|item1|item2}} | {{braces|code=on |Templatename|item1|item2}} | {{braces |Templatename|item1{{=}}XYZ|item2{{=}}PQR}} | {{braces |Templatename|item1{{=}}XYZ|item2{{=}}PQR}} | {{braces|code=on |Templatename|item1{{=}}XYZ|item2{{=}}PQR}} | {{braces |code=on |Templatename|item1{{=}}XYZ|item2{{=}}PQR}} }} Note that omitting the double-braces around the equals signs in the last two examples does not work as intended: {{Markup | col2 = Output | {{braces |Templatename|item1=XYZ|item2=PQR}} | {{braces |Templatename|item1=XYZ|item2=PQR}} | {{braces |code=on |Templatename|item1=XYZ|item2=PQR}} | {{braces |code=on |Templatename|item1=XYZ|item2=PQR}} }} == See also == * {{tl|brackets}} * {{tl|bracket}} * {{tl|nowiki}} * {{tl|mono}} * {{tl|mset}} * {{tl|(())}} {{Sandbox other|| }} [[Category:templates missing wikidata]] [[Category:templates missing wikidata]] [[Category:templates missing wikidata]] [[Category:Character-substitution templates]] [[Category:Wikitext typing-aid templates]] [[Category:Templates]] [[Category:Templates fixed with noinclude]]
